name: Bay Meadows Indoor Golf
about: Bay Meadows Indoor Golf is a premier golf simulator center offering year-round access to virtual play on over 40 of the world's finest courses. Located in Queensbury, NY, the venue features five state-of-the-art PGA Tour Simulators equipped with advanced 3Trak and Immersive Play Technology for pinpoint accuracy and a realistic golf experience. The facility also includes an on-site golf course, a practice green, a driving range, and an attached pub and grill, making it a comprehensive destination for both on-course and simulated golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium 3Trak launch monitor provides laboratory-level accuracy for ball and club tracking
Access to over 40 challenging virtual courses for practice and play in any weather
Attached Bogey's Pub & Grill offers fine dining at casual prices for a complete experience
Winter golf leagues provide structured play and social opportunities with special rates
Professional instruction is available from a knowledgeable golf course pro

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with famous crab cakes, burgers, wraps, and pizzas. Fine dining at casual prices.
Large assortment of local, domestic, and imported beers, along with fine wines from around the world. Take-out available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Reference-quality laboratory level launch tracking system, the first of its kind commercially available. Provides unyielding dynamic performance and pinpoint accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides clubs for use, but golfers are welcome to bring their own equipment to play on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar, Bogey's Pub & Grill, which offers food and drinks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The league specifics mention a 2 hours and 15 minutes limit for 9 holes per foursome, suggesting 18 holes would take approximately 4.5 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers junior golf leagues, making it suitable for players of all ages and skill levels.
